title: 【真事】含大學生懷疑因瀏覽色情網站，導致全體師生Email被黑客入侵，現被Google緊急停用。

replies.msg:
[學生會] 轉發來自學校部門就電郵帳戶被停用之消息
-----------------------------------
各位老師同學： (Scroll down for English)

今天晚上七時半左右，ITSC 陸續收到報告，我們所有的 Google 戶口
均被停止使用，連管理員戶口也不能倖免。我們已即時聯絡
香港及海外Google Support , 他們回覆說懷疑我們有些戶口遭黑客
入侵，連續寄出垃圾電郵，所以自動停止，他們要經過一定程序
才能重新啟動。可能要數天！

由於許多老師同學均會用Google Drive 下載文件，我們擔心會嚴重
影響明天上課及工作。請各位老師同學幫忙，透過WhatsAPP或其
他方法，通知你認識的同事同學。

ITSC 對是次事故，深感抱歉，我們不應過度倚賴Google。我們會
繼續努力，期望Google 儘快重新啟動我們的服務。我們也檢討其他
方案，當Google 出事，我們仍然能保持一定的內聯網服務。

------------------------------------------------------

Dear Staff/Students,

We are sorry to report that Google has suspended all our
accounts at around 7:30 this evening. Even our administrator
account cannot be used and we cannot do anything. We
contacted Google Support HK immediately and they replied that
some of our accounts have been compromised and subsequently
sending out spam emails. They need time to check before
recovering our service. And it could take days!

As most teachers/students will be downloading files from Google,
we request your help to spread this news to your colleagues and
and classmates. Through Whatsapp, phone calls, in whatever
channels.

ITSC deeply regrets the happening of this incident. We should never
have relied so much on Google. We will keep on contacting Google
to request the resume of service, and we will review other solutions
that will allow us to maintain service even if Google services fail us.

香港恒生大學學生會
The Hang Seng University of Hong Kong Students' Union
應該係香港大專史上最柒事件之一
😂😂🤙🏻🤙🏻

今天晚上七時半左右，ITSC 陸續收到報告，我們所有的 Google 戶口
